/usr/bin/ar qc libbczl_core.a CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/application/central_zone_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/application/command_arbitrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/application/lamp_state_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/application/node_health_monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/application/rear_lighting_function_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/domain/lighting_payload_codec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/hmi/hmi_command_mapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/hmi/hmi_view_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/hmi/main_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/platform/linux/linux_clock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/platform/linux/linux_logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/platform/linux/process_signal_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/platform/stm32/ethernet_link_supervisor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/platform/stm32/gpio_output_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/platform/stm32/stm32_diagnostic_logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/service/rear_lighting_service_consumer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/service/rear_lighting_service_provider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/transport/someip_message_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/transport/someip_message_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/transport/vsomeip/vsomeip_client_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/transport/vsomeip/vsomeip_runtime_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bczl_core.dir/transport/vsomeip/vsomeip_server_adapter.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libbczl_core.a
